titleStmt.title: SII 40.65: original edition by K. Munirathnam
No. 65. (A.R. No. B. 43 of 1930.) Gāmālapāḍu, Palnad Taluk, Guntur District, Andhra Pradesh.

summary.p: On a slab lying in the boundary between Irikapalli and Gāmālapāḍu.
This is dated Śaka 1[2]34, Paridhāvi, Phalguṇa, śu. [1]2, [Friday].
Records the gift of land by Mahārāya-Gajasāhiṇi Guyiraḍḍiṅgāru for the merit of Kēsāni-Ammaṅgāru and Rudradēva, on the occasion of installation of the image Mandēśvara Mahadēvara at Gārālapāḍu.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī śakavarurṣaṁbulu 1234 ya
gunēṭi paridhāvi saṁvatsarada phālguṇa śu 12 śu
grārālapāṭanu maṁḍēśvara mahādē
vara pratiṣṭhakālamunāṁḍḍu pōsi
śrīmanmahārāya gajasāhiṇi svā
midrōhāragaṁḍa guyiraḍḍiṁgāru kē
sāni Ammaṁgārikini rudradēvaniṁgā
rikini puṇyamugānu sugabhōgārtada
peṭṭina datti pulipāṭi tervu dakṣaṇāna
mādavadēvara vritti vīni tūrppuna
rēgaḍuku dattina 1 gaṭada ponana te
rvu dakṣiṇāna rēgaḍugā kuduru
na 16 Āpolānana 1 gaṁḍālatervu
Uttarāna rēgaḍu kuduruna
polāna negoraguridiṁda tervu
dakṣaṇāna Akkavāri cēni kuṭaṭanuṁ
rēgaḍukuḍuruna 11 . pulipā
ṭi tervu dakṣiṇāna rēgaḍu kuduruna
4 . Ā tervu dakṣaṇāna rēgaḍu
kuduruna 5 verasi cēnu kha 3 na 1
pannu suṁkamu mānyamu
Digital edition of SII 40.65 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
